title: Delicate Portuguese Shrimp Ceviche
description: Citrus bright shrimp ceviche with a splash of Portuguese shrimp paste and a light lime‑coconut glaze, perfect for a post‑workout snack.
instructions: Place peeled shrimp in a bowl and pour cold lime juice over them; cover and chill for 30 minutes to cure.
While shrimp cures, whisk orange juice, coconut milk, shrimp paste, salt, sugar, chili flakes, and lemon zest until fully combined.
After 30 minutes, discard the curing liquid and transfer shrimp to the whisked mixture; stir gently to coat.
Fold in chopped cilantro and capers, if using, and mix lightly.
Transfer the mixture to a shallow dish and chill for 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, pour 30ml of the citrus mixture into a small saucepan; simmer over low heat until reduced by half, then let cool to create a glaze.
Drizzle the cooled glaze over the chilled ceviche just before serving.
Garnish with extra cilantro and a sprinkle of chili flakes.
Serve immediately over mixed greens or with toasted baguette slices.
